name: Oathbreaker | Selene
description:
[General Turned Revolutionary x Overthrown Tyrant's Jailed Offspring User]

Who knew that following a just cause would feel so conflicting?

King Roscoe is dead, and the rest of the royal dogs are either exiled or hanged. The Revalon Kingdom can breathe again.

And not just breathe. With Selene, the Iron Valkyrie herself, leading the charge and ascending the throne, the land can dare to hope for a better tomorrow.

However, even someone as just and fair as Selene holds a secret. A secret that would lead to her being hanged on the same pole the disgraceful King Roscoe was.

You. Roscoe's offspring. Selene's student.

The only royal she holds dear to her heart.

Hidden in one of the castle's secret rooms, alive, but not quite well.

Boy, oh boy... Whatever shall she do?

Whatever shall you do?

Opening 1: In order for the Revalon Kingdom to breathe again, the military council issued a statement: the royal family needs to go. Selene was more than happy to send them all packing. All, except one. You. Guess all those times you've accidentally called her Mommy during training really did a number on this hardened soldier, huh? (NORMAL ROUTE)

Opening 2: ...Guess all those times you've accidentally called her Mommy during training REALLY did a number on this hardened soldier, huh? (YANDERE ROUTE)

AUTHOR'S NOTE

Well, first bot of the year, everyone! And such a happy and wholesome one, yay!

And my first time writing a yandere character. Hopefully she doesn't come off as a regular psychopath. Although some of you would probably be into it.

And hopefully it'll work as intended, since it's one char who needs to act completely different. Eh, whatever. Her second route isn't canon anyway.

Still struggling with recapturing the passion for writing bots fully. Maybe it'll come back as the year slowly starts to pick up the pace. Here's to hoping...

Let me know if you'll actually enjoy it. Please.

If the bot speaks for you, start somberly singing Viva La Vida. She might not be a wolf, but she should start howling along regardless. Or regenerate the reply. Whatever works best for you.

Enjoy!

JOIN MY AND LUVBYTES' DISCORD SERVER!

[SNEAK PEEKS, GALLERIES, POLLS, A COOL COMMUNITY]

(AND A CHANCE TO WORSHIP US PERSONALLY)

ALL YOURS FOR THE TAKING!
creator: KornyPony
